theme_and_archetype.rationale: Medical dashboards need high readability and low cognitive load. A deeply desaturated dark mode (Zinc/Slate) with clear, high-contrast structural borders rather than shadows ensures data legibility. Saturated accents are strictly reserved for status indicators (Emerald for success, Amber for pending, Soft Blue for CTAs).

rules: Use strict grid hierarchy with dense and compact spacing. gap-4 or gap-6.
Override default stretch behavior with align-items: start, use align-self: stretch only when needed.
Containers with borders must have internal padding (p-6) to prevent text collision.
Dashboard Cards: Flat background (bg-zinc-900), 1px subtle border (border-zinc-800), NO shadow. Max 8px border-radius.
Navigation: Persistent sidebar navigation with high contrast active states.

component_rules.buttons: Sharp edges or minimal rounding (rounded-md). Explicit text color on hover. Primary CTA uses blue-600.
component_rules.cards: Cardless or completely flat design. border-collapse layouts for lists to create 'Grid Borders' technical look.
component_rules.tables: Dense rows. text-sm. Hover states on rows: hover:bg-zinc-800/50. Clearly distinguished header row.
component_rules.checklists: Custom Checkbox component (Shadcn-based) mapped to Discharge Workflow. Strikethrough text-zinc-500 on completion.
component_rules.ai_summary: Use a subtle glowing border or soft blue background tint (bg-blue-900/10 border-blue-800/30) to distinguish AI-generated content from standard inputs.
component_rules.forms: Use Shadcn Input, Select, and Form. Never use native html inputs.
component_rules.modals_dialogs: Use Shadcn Dialog with backdrop-blur-sm overlay and dark (zinc-900) surface. Include close 'X' button.
component_rules.toast_notifications: Use Sonner for real-time status updates (e.g., 'Discharge approved', 'Medication prepared'). Dark mode styled.

motion_and_interaction.hover: All interactive elements must have a subtle background or border color shift.
motion_and_interaction.focus: High contrast focus rings required for keyboard accessibility (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:outline-none).
motion_and_interaction.transitions: Fast, minimal micro-interactions. transition-colors duration-200 ease-in-out.

icons.usage: Use stroke-width 1.5 for a clean, professional technical feel.

login_background.description: Abstract dark blue texture background for the main login screen.

hospital_building_night.description: Hospital building illuminated at night, perfect for a hero split-screen login page.

testing.data_testid_rules: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case. Examples: login-form-submit-button, patient-list-table, generate-ai-summary-btn.
